features.description: Deny rules on home-directory paths now block Bash commands referencing the path via $HOME.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed deny rules on home-directory paths (e.g. `Read(~/Desktop/**)`) not blocking Bash commands that reference the path via `$HOME`

features.description: Org-managed permission rules now apply for the entire session when managed settings fetch completes during startup.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed org-managed permission rules not applying for the entire session when the managed settings fetch completed during startup on a fresh config directory

features.description: Hook `if: "Bash(...)"` conditions now match commands inside subshells and backticks, not every $()/$VAR command.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed hook `if: "Bash(...)"` conditions firing on every Bash command containing `$()` or `$VAR`; the pattern now matches against commands inside subshells and backticks too

features.description: New `/plugin list` command lists installed plugins with `--enabled`/`--disabled` filters.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `/plugin list` command to list installed plugins, with `--enabled`/`--disabled` filters

features.description: Added a "c to copy" shortcut to `/btw` that copies the raw markdown answer to the clipboard.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added a "c to copy" shortcut to `/btw` that copies the raw markdown answer to the clipboard, preserving formatting when pasted elsewhere

features.description: New `requiredMinimumVersion`/`requiredMaximumVersion` managed settings — CC refuses to start outside the allowed range.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `requiredMinimumVersion` and `requiredMaximumVersion` managed settings — Claude Code refuses to start if its version is outside the allowed range and directs the user to an approved version

features.description: Stop and SubagentStop hooks can return `hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext` to feed Claude without a hook error.
features.reference_changelog_line: Hooks: Stop and SubagentStop hooks can now return `hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext` to give Claude feedback and keep the turn going without being labeled a hook error

features.description: Skills support `\$` escape syntax to include a literal `$` before a digit in command bodies.
features.reference_changelog_line: Skills: added `\$` escape syntax to include a literal `$` before a digit in command bodies

features.description: stdio MCP servers receive the same `CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID` as hooks/Bash on `--resume`.
features.reference_changelog_line: stdio MCP servers now receive the same `CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID` as hooks/Bash on `--resume`
